data.title: A Phase II Trial of Dasatinib in Advanced Sarcomas
data.brief_summary: This study will examine the response rate and the 6-month progression-free survival rates of subjects with advanced sarcoma treated with dasatinib.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

1. Unresectable, recurrent, or metastatic histologically-confirmed soft tissue or bone sarcoma of one of the following subtypes:

   * Leiomyosarcoma --\* NO LONGER ELIGIBLE\*
   * Liposarcoma--\* NO LONGER ELIGIBLE\*
   * Malignant fibrous histiocytoma (MFH)/pleomorphic undiffe
endpoints: Response Rate: Number of Participants With Objective Tumor Response
6 Month Progression-free Survival Rate of "Indolent" Sarcomas Treated With Dasatinib
6 Month Progression-free Survival Rate of Gastrointestinal Stromal Tumors (GIST)
data.sponsor: Sarcoma Alliance for Research through Collaboration
